evidence: "Four guys get into a bad situation that just keeps getting worse every episode."
"The bad guys seem to have won, but then there really aren't any good guys in this patch of Royal history."
"I hate it when I find myself rooting for the bad guys. In spite of that this is a good series."
"I generally don't watch Cop Shows. I have watched this show on the network for years, and have enjoyed watching it again on Amazon Prime."
"The acting is good and the characters are interesting."
"The characters and special effects are great. You can almost believe they are real."
"I generally avoid FBI shows, this one is good, perhaps because it bears little resemblance to the real FBI."
"I avoided this series for a long time, but was looking for something with a lot of episodes available on Prime."
"Listening to the complex symphonic theme music at the beginning and end of each episode almost makes watching an episode worthwhile."
"The characters and special effects are great. You can almost believe they are real."
"Can't bring myself to identify with gun running murderers no matter how well they paint them."

summary: The user enjoys law enforcement dramas and sci-fi series, often appreciating strong character development and production quality. They prefer fast-paced narratives but have mixed feelings about emotional engagement, indicating a focus on entertainment over deep emotional connections.
